narrative:
Perry County has 22,312 registered voters, with 55.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.5 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.9% of registrants.
